fml.menu.mods.mainPage.title: Metalion's Experience Tweaks
experiencetweaks.gui.config.title: Experience Tweaks Config
experiencetweaks.gui.config.unlock_all_r: Are you sure you want to unlock all recipes for all players? This action cannot be undone.
experiencetweaks.command.reset.data_unav: Enchantment data is not available (server not running?).
experiencetweaks.command.reset.no_data: %s had no cooldown data to reset.
experiencetweaks.enchant.tooltip.no_cons: Your level will not be consumed in enchanting.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x001: Invalid consumable item configured. Lapis Lazuli will be used as fallback. Check 'enchantmentCostItem' and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x002: Configured consumable item was not found in the registry. Lapis Lazuli will be used as fallback. Check 'enchantmentCostItem' for typos.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x003: Could not read the 'directExperience' setting. Experience will drop directly to players (default). Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x004: Could not read the 'keepExperience' setting. Experience will be kept on death by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x005: Could not read the item cost multiplier for enchanting. Using 1.5x as fallback. Check 'enchantmentCostMultiplier' and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x006: Could not read the enchantment cooldown mode. Using 'current_level' as fallback. Check 'enchantmentCooldownType' and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x007: Could not read enchantment button base levels. Default thresholds will be used. Check 'enchantmentBaseRequiredLevels' and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x008: Could not read the enchantment difficulty bias. Using 0.25 (balanced default). Check 'enchantmentRequiredLevelBias' and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x009: Could not read 'giveExperienceEveryDay' setting. Daily experience rewards will be disabled by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x00a: Could not read 'giveExperienceEveryDayBase' setting. Falling back to 5 experience points. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x00b: Could not read 'giveExperienceEveryDayGrowth' setting. Falling back to 0.1 (10% growth). Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.daily_xp.reward: You survived another day without dying and earned %s experience points! (Survival streak: %s days).
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x00c: Could not read the 'autoFishing' setting. Auto-fishing will be disabled by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x00d: Could not read the 'autoFishingRecast' setting. Recasting will be enabled by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x00e: Could not read the 'anvilBypassTooExpensive' setting. The cap will be bypassed by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x00f: Could not read the 'anvilUseItemCost' setting. Anvils will use levels by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x010: Invalid anvil cost item configured. Emerald will be used as fallback. Check 'anvilCostItem' and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x011: Configured anvil cost item was not found in the registry. Emerald will be used as fallback. Check 'anvilCostItem' for typos.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x012: Could not read the item cost multiplier for anvils. Using 0.5x as fallback. Check 'anvilItemCostMultiplier' and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x013: Could not read the 'allowMendingWithInfinity' setting. Mending and Infinity will remain incompatible by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x014: Could not read the 'anvilEnchantmentExtraction' setting. Enchantment extraction will be enabled by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x015: Could not read the 'anvilEnchantmentExtractionDestroySource' setting. The source item will be destroyed when emptied by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x016: Could not read the 'waterBelowHydratesFarmland' setting. Water under farmland will hydrate it by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x017: Could not read the 'waterHydrationRadius' setting. Using radius 4 by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x018: Could not read the 'milkBucketNutrition' setting. Milk will restore 2 food points by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x019: Could not read the 'wanderingTraderUnlimitedTrades' setting. Unlimited trades will be enabled by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x01a: Could not read the 'villagerUnlimitedTrades' setting. Unlimited trades will be enabled by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x01b: Could not read the 'allArrowsAffectedByInfinity' setting. All arrows will not be affected by Infinity by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x01c: Could not read the 'allowMultipleDamageEnchantments' setting. Sharpness, Smite, and Bane of Arthropods will remain mutually exclusive by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x01d: Could not read the 'allowMultipleProtectionEnchantments' setting. Protection, Projectile Protection, Fire Protection, and Blast Protection will remain mutually exclusive by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x01e: Could not read the 'allowPiercingWithMultishot' setting. Piercing and Multishot will remain mutually exclusive by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x01f: Could not read the 'allowMultipleTridentEnchantments' setting. Channeling, Loyalty, and Riptide will remain mutually exclusive by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x020: Could not read the 'riptideAnywhere' setting. Riptide will remain restricted by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x021: Could not read the 'anvilDurabilityMultiplier' setting. Anvil durability multiplier will be 100% by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x022: Could not read the 'mobArrowsCollectible' setting. Mob arrows will remain uncollectible by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.keep_experie: Keep your experience level and progress when you die.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.direct_exper: Collect experience from mobs directly without spawning orbs.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.give_experie: Receive experience points survival rewards every in-game day.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.auto_fishing: Automatically reel in fish when they bite.
Automatically recast the fishing rod after catching a fish.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.riptide_anyw: Allows using Riptide enchantment at any time, even without rain or water.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.give_experie: Base experience points awarded for surviving a day.
Daily reward growth percentage for survived consecutive days.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.anvil_bypass: Bypasses the vanilla 40 level cap limit in anvils.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.anvil_use_it: Uses custom items instead of experience levels for anvil operations.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.anvil_cost_i: Item resource location to be used as anvil fee (e.g., minecraft:emerald).
experiencetweaks.gui.config.anvil_item_c: Multiplier to calculate required item cost based on operation levels.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.anvil_durabi: Adjusts durability scale of anvils. Range: 1% to 1000%.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.allow_mendin: Enables combining Mending and Infinity on bows.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.anvil_enchan: Allows extracting enchantments from items onto books.
Destroys the source item if all enchantments are extracted.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.enchantment_: Item resource location to be used as enchanting fee (e.g., minecraft:emerald).
Multiplier for enchantment item fee calculations.
Determines whether cooldown is based on current or last player level.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.water_below_: Enables water directly beneath farmland blocks to hydrate them.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.water_hydrat: Hydration block radius for water sources (default: 4).
experiencetweaks.gui.config.milk_bucket_: Adjusts food/saturation points restored by drinking milk (default: 2).
experiencetweaks.gui.config.wandering_tr: Removes limits on trades offered by Wandering Traders.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.villager_unl: Removes daily locks and limits on trades offered by normal Villagers.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.all_arrows_a: Allows Infinity enchantment to apply to all arrow types.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.allow_multip: Allows Sharpness, Smite, and Bane of Arthropods on the same weapon.
Allows combining different protection enchantments on armor items.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.allow_pierci: Allows combining Piercing and Multishot on crossbows.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.allow_multip: Allows combining Channeling, Loyalty, and Riptide on trident items.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.unlock_all_r: Instantly unlocks all crafting and utility recipes for all players on the server.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.enable_debug: Enable logging configuration changes and events to the console.
experiencetweaks.gui.config.mob_arrows_c: Allows players to pick up arrows shot by Skeletons, Pillagers, and other mobs.
